notes: Sounds a lot more human: fretboard, chord and trainer notes now play a real sampled steel guitar instead of a synth beep, and the Jam band got loose — natural timing and volume variation, accented hi-hats, up/down strums, plus two new comp instruments (clean electric and nylon guitar, MIT-licensed FluidR3 samples). Also in 0.17: clearer buttons and dropdowns, a stationary metronome Tap pad, and every chord in your key as diagrams on the Chords page.
